provides.name: git.changed.files
provides.description: Reports changed files from git status.

entry_script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
changed=$(git status --short | wc -l | tr -d ' ')
sz bus emit changed.files "{\"count\":$changed}" --module "${SZ_MODULE_ID:-changed-file-detector}" >/dev/null
notes: Test-only canned module for dynamic template absorption.
